title: Experiment artefacts: DTW search and evaluation
author: San, Nay
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Results from query-by-example spoken term detection (QbE-STD) tasks using a Dynamic Time Warping (DTW) search ( see description of procedure and associated experiment code ) from main experiments with 54 feature extraction methods (BNF; MFCC; wav2vec 2.0 English/XLSR Encoder, Quantiser, and Transformer Layers 1-24)
